lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਮਈਆ ਰਮਤ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt rameea ramat raam raae gur sabad guroo liv laage |
lines.english: The All-pervading Sovereign Lord King is contained in each and every heart. Through the Guru, and the Word of the Guru's Shabad, I am lovingly centered on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਿਆਰੈ ਦੀਪਕ ਆਨਿ ਜਲਾਏ ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: andhiaarai deepak aan jalaae gur giaan guroo liv laage |
lines.english: In the darkness, the Guru has lit the lamp of the Guru's wisdom; I am lovingly focused on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਦੇਵਉ ਕਾਟਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਕਉ ਮੇਰਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਗੁਰ ਬਚਨੀ ਭਾਗੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: hau man tan devau kaatt guroo kau meraa bhram bhau gur bachanee bhaage |2|
lines.english: Cutting my mind and body into pieces, I offer them to my Guru. The Guru's Teachings have dispelled my doubt and fear. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅੰਧੇਰਾ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਬਿਨਾਸਿਓ ਘਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਲਹੀ ਮਨ ਜਾਗੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: agiaan andheraa binas binaasio ghar vasat lahee man jaage |3|
lines.english: The darkness of ignorance has been dispelled, and my mind has been awakened; within the home of my inner being, I have found the genuine article. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਕਤ ਬਧਿਕ ਮਾਇਆਧਾਰੀ ਤਿਨ ਜਮ ਜੋਹਨਿ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: saakat badhik maaeaadhaaree tin jam johan laage |
lines.english: The vicious hunters, the faithless cynics, are hunted down by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਸੀਸੁ ਨ ਬੇਚਿਆ ਓਇ ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਅਭਾਗੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aun satigur aagai sees na bechiaa oe aaveh jaeh abhaage |4|
lines.english: They have not sold their heads to the True Guru; those wretched, unfortunate ones continue coming and going in reincarnation. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਲਜ ਪਾਤਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਹੈ ਸਿਰੁ ਬੇਚਿਓ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਗੇ ॥੫॥੧੦॥੨੪॥੬੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kee laj paat guroo hai sir bechio satigur aage |5|10|24|62|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's honor and respect is the Guru; he has sold his head to the True Guru. ||5||10||24||62||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰਾ ਬਿਨਉ ਸੁਨਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹਮ ਸਰਣਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: hamaraa binau sunahu prabh tthaakur ham saran prabhoo har maage |
lines.english: Hear my prayer, O God, my Lord and Master: I beg for the Sanctuary of the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ਅਹੰਕਾਰ ਅਗਿਆਨ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ham ahankaaree ahankaar agiaan mat gur miliai aap gavaaeaa |
lines.english: I am egotistical and conceited, and my intellect is ignorant. Meeting the Guru, my selfishness and conceit have been abolished.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: haumai rog geaa sukh paaeaa dhan dhan guroo har raaeaa |1|
lines.english: The illness of egotism is gone, and I have found peace. Blessed, blessed is the Guru, the Sovereign Lord King. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਬਚਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam gur kai bachan har paaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have found the Lord, through the Teachings of the Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਹੀਅਰੈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਇ ਕੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪੰਥੁ ਬਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: merai heearai preet raam raae kee gur maarag panth bataaeaa |
lines.english: My heart is filled with love for the Sovereign Lord King; the Guru has shown me the path and the way to find Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਛੁੜਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: meraa jeeo pindd sabh satigur aagai jin vichhurriaa har gal laaeaa |2|
lines.english: My soul and body all belong to the Guru; I was separated, and He has led me into the Lord's Embrace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਅਨੰਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਮੋਰੈ ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਆਪੁ ਵੇਚਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sehaj anand bheaa man morai gur aagai aap vechaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Within my mind, intuitive peace and bliss have arisen; I have sold myself to the Guru. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗੀ ਦੇਖਨ ਕਉ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੇ ਨਾਲਿ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: merai antar preet lagee dekhan kau gur hirade naal dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: Deep within myself, I would love to see the Lord; the Guru has inspired me to see Him within my heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਅਪਰਾਧ ਪਾਪ ਬਹੁ ਕੀਨੇ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਸਟੀ ਚੋਰ ਚੁਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ham aparaadh paap bahu keene kar dusattee chor churaaeaa |
lines.english: I am a sinner - I have committed so many sins; I am a villainous, thieving thief.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਾਗਤਿ ਆਏ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਲਾਜ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੨੫॥੬੩॥
lines.translit: ab naanak saranaagat aae har raakhahu laaj har bhaaeaa |4|11|25|63|
lines.english: Now, Nanak has come to the Lord's Sanctuary; preserve my honor, Lord, as it pleases Your Will. ||4||11||25||63||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree poorabee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਬਾਜੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਨਾਹਦੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramat baajai sabad anaahad guramat manooaa gaavai |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the unstruck music resounds; through the Guru's Teachings, the mind sings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee gur darasan paaeaa dhan dhan guroo liv laavai |1|
lines.english: By great good fortune, I received the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan. Blessed, blessed is the Guru, who has led me to love the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har liv laavai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is lovingly centered on the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰਾ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਮਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hamaraa tthaakur satigur pooraa man gur kee kaar kamaavai |
lines.english: My Lord and Master is the Perfect True Guru. My mind works to serve the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਮਲਿ ਮਲਿ ਧੋਵਹ ਪਾਵ ਗੁਰੂ ਕੇ ਜੋ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਥਾ ਸੁਨਾਵੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ham mal mal dhovah paav guroo ke jo har har kathaa sunaavai |2|
lines.english: I massage and wash the Feet of the Guru, who recites the Sermon of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਣੁ ਜਿਹਵਾ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: hiradai guramat raam rasaaein jihavaa har gun gaavai |
lines.english: The Teachings of the Guru are in my heart; the Lord is the Source of nectar. My tongue sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਆਘਾਨੇ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਭੂਖ ਲਗਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man rasak rasak har ras aaghaane fir bahur na bhookh lagaavai |3|
lines.english: My mind is immersed in, and drenched with the Lord's essence. Fulfilled with the Lord's Love, I shall never feel hunger again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਕਰੈ ਉਪਾਵ ਅਨੇਕ ਬਹੁਤੇਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: koee karai upaav anek bahutere bin kirapaa naam na paavai |
lines.english: People try all sorts of things, but without the Lord's Mercy, His Name is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਉ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਵੈ ॥੪॥੧੨॥੨੬॥੬੪॥
lines.translit: jan naanak kau har kirapaa dhaaree mat guramat naam drirraavai |4|12|26|64|
lines.english: The Lord has showered His Mercy upon servant Nanak; through the wisdom of the Guru's Teachings, he has enshrined the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||4||12||26||64||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਮਾਝ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree maajh mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Maajh, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਮਾਤਾ ਮਤਿ ਜੀਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਮੁਖਿ ਰਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: mat maataa mat jeeo naam mukh raamaa |
lines.english: Make that teaching your mother, that it may teach you to keep the Lord's Name in your mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਿੰਦੂ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰੰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh jindoo jap naam karamaa |
lines.english: O my soul, as Gurmukh, do this deed: chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਪਿਤਾ ਕਰਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਅਜਨਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: santokh pitaa kar gur purakh ajanamaa |
lines.english: Let contentment be your father; the Guru is the Primal Being, beyond birth or incarnation.
